### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>checkpoint-restore/go-criu (github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v7)</summary>

### [`v7.1.0`](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/releases/tag/v7.1.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v7.0.0...v7.1.0)

#### What's Changed

-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.11.0 to 0.12.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/151](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/151)
-   chore: fix lints from `protogetter` by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/153](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/153)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.12.0 to 0.13.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/152](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/152)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.13.0 to 0.15.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/155](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/155)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.7.0 to 1.8.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/156](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/156)
-   fix(crit): use proto names in JSON by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/157](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/157)
-   fix(crit): use snake_case names in `crit explore` by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/158](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/158)
-   build(deps): bump google.golang.org/protobuf from 1.31.0 to 1.32.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/159](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/159)
-   chore: fix linting issues by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/162](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/162)
-   fix(coverage): ignore test files by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/166](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/166)
-   Add functions which are used in Podman, CRI-O and containerd by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/165](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/165)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.15.0 to 0.18.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/164](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/164)
-   release: v7.1.0 by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/168](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/168)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v7.0.0...v7.1.0
